```{r}
#| label: ci_fetch_data
#| include: false
library(gh)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(gt)
library(lubridate)

owner <- "apache"
repo <- "arrow"

fetch_runs <- function(params, max_pages = 5) {
  runs <- list()
  for (page in seq_len(max_pages)) {
    resp <- gh(
      "GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/runs",
      owner = owner, repo = repo,
      .params = c(params, per_page = 100, page = page)
    )
    runs <- c(runs, resp$workflow_runs)
    if (length(resp$workflow_runs) < 100) break
  }
  runs
}

fetch_failed_jobs <- function(run_id) {
  resp <- gh(
    "GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/runs/{run_id}/jobs",
    owner = owner, repo = repo, run_id = run_id,
    filter = "latest", per_page = 100
  )
  keep(resp$jobs, ~ .x$conclusion == "failure")
}

get_pr_for_run <- function(run) {
  sha <- run$head_sha
  if (is.null(sha)) return(list(number = NULL, title = NULL))
  tryCatch({
    prs <- gh(
      "GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/commits/{sha}/pulls",
      owner = owner, repo = repo, sha = sha
    )
    if (length(prs) > 0) {
      list(number = prs[[1]]$number, title = prs[[1]]$title)
    } else {
      list(number = NULL, title = NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) list(number = NULL, title = NULL))
}

# --- Failing on main ---
main_runs <- fetch_runs(list(branch = "main", status = "completed"), max_pages = 5)

# Group by workflow, sorted by run_number descending
runs_by_workflow <- split(main_runs, map_chr(main_runs, "name"))
runs_by_workflow <- map(runs_by_workflow, ~ .x[order(map_int(.x, "run_number"), decreasing = TRUE)])

main_failures <- list()

for (name in sort(names(runs_by_workflow))) {
  runs <- runs_by_workflow[[name]]
  if (length(runs) == 0 || runs[[1]]$conclusion != "failure") next

  # Count consecutive failures and find the first failing run
  streak <- 0
  first_failing_run <- NULL
  for (run in runs) {
    if (identical(run$conclusion, "failure")) {
      streak <- streak + 1
      first_failing_run <- run
    } else {
      break
    }
  }

  # Only show if failing 2+ consecutive runs
  if (streak < 2) next

  failing_since <- as.Date(first_failing_run$created_at)
  days_failing <- as.integer(Sys.Date() - failing_since)

  # Find the PR that started the failure streak
  pr_info <- get_pr_for_run(first_failing_run)
  if (!is.null(pr_info$number)) {
    broke_since <- paste0(
      '<a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/', owner, "/", repo,
      "/pull/", pr_info$number, '">#', pr_info$number, "</a>"
    )
  } else {
    sha <- substr(first_failing_run$head_sha %||% "", 1, 8)
    broke_since <- paste0(
      '<a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/', owner, "/", repo,
      "/commit/", sha, '">', sha, "</a>"
    )
  }

  latest_run <- runs[[1]]
  failed_jobs <- fetch_failed_jobs(latest_run$id)

  if (length(failed_jobs) > 0) {
    for (job in failed_jobs) {
      main_failures <- c(main_failures, list(tibble(
        Workflow = name,
        Job = job$name,
        `Failing Since` = format(failing_since, "%Y-%m-%d"),
        Days = days_failing,
        `Broke Since` = broke_since,
        URL = job$html_url
      )))
    }
  } else {
    main_failures <- c(main_failures, list(tibble(
      Workflow = name,
      Job = "(unknown)",
      `Failing Since` = format(failing_since, "%Y-%m-%d"),
      Days = days_failing,
      `Broke Since` = broke_since,
      URL = latest_run$html_url
    )))
  }
}

main_failures_df <- if (length(main_failures) > 0) {
  bind_rows(main_failures) |> arrange(desc(Days))
} else {
  tibble(Workflow = character(), Job = character(), `Failing Since` = character(),
         Days = integer(), `Broke Since` = character(), URL = character())
}

```

## Row

### Column {width=40%}

::: {.card title="Currently Failing on Main" expandable="true"}

```{r}
#| label: ci_main_failures
#| echo: false
if (nrow(main_failures_df) == 0) {
  cat("**All workflows passing on main!**")
} else {
  main_failures_df |>
    mutate(
      Job = paste0('<a target="_blank" href="', URL, '">', Job, "</a>")
    ) |>
    select(-URL) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = c(Job, `Broke Since`)) |>
    cols_align(align = "right", columns = Days) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(100),
      container.overflow.y = TRUE
    )
}
```

:::

### Column {width=60%}

::: {.card title="Crossbow Nightly Report"}

[View full report](https://crossbow.arrow-dev.org/){target="_blank"}

<iframe src="https://crossbow.arrow-dev.org/" width="100%" height="800" style="border: none;"></iframe>

:::
